title: Bevy Runtime Productization Workstream
problem: Turn the Bevy backend proof into runtime-backed examples, renderer harness coverage, and a richer editor shell surface.
evidence: BRP-020 windowed runtime proof: cargo +stable check -p dear-imgui-bevy --features render --example windowed_overlay PASS; manual run command documented

BRP-030 runtime renderer harness: cargo +stable nextest run -p dear-imgui-bevy --features render PASS with 2 skipped ignored GPU harness tests; DEAR_IMGUI_BEVY_GPU_HARNESS=1 cargo +stable test -p dear-imgui-bevy --features render --lib bevy_image_texture_bind_groups -- --ignored --nocapture PASS

BRP-040 editor shell productization: cargo +stable check -p dear-imgui-bevy --features render --example editor_shell PASS; cargo +stable nextest run -p dear-imgui-bevy --features render PASS with 2 skipped ignored GPU harness tests

BRP-050 closeout: cargo +stable fmt --all --check PASS; cargo +stable check -p dear-imgui-bevy --features render --example windowed_overlay PASS; cargo +stable check -p dear-imgui-bevy --features render --example editor_shell PASS; cargo +stable nextest run -p dear-imgui-bevy --features render PASS with 2 skipped ignored GPU harness tests; cargo +stable test -p dear-imgui-bevy --features render render_extract_clones_snapshot_texture_requests_and_camera_targets -- --nocapture PASS; cargo +stable clippy -p dear-imgui-bevy --all-targets --features render --no-deps -- -D warnings PASS

continue_policy.notes: BRP-010, BRP-020, BRP-030, BRP-040, and BRP-050 are complete. Open a new follow-on workstream for any future runtime/editor slices.
